key_dungeons.name: Crumbling Catacombs
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Crumbling Catacombs. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Crumbling Catacombs for the hidden Gold Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

game_log: Welcome to Thorndale!
Elder Bera: Listen well — the Crumbling Catacombs holds a powerful artifact. Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
Elder Bera: Will you seek it out and bring it back to save us?
Elder Bera: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the locations on your map. Be careful out there!
You descend into Crumbling Catacombs - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party defeated Goblin.
Selina picked up: Torch
Selina picked up: Healing Herb
Selina picked up: 10 gold
The party defeated Rat Nest.
Merry spotted a trap!
Merry failed to pick the lock. (14 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (13 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (12 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 19 gold and Club.
Merry failed to pick the lock. (11 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (10 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (9 picks left)
Found the Gold Key! A portal appears!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 29 gold and Sling.
The portal returns you to the surface!
-- Ancient Battlefield --
Rusted swords and broken shields litter the ground between bleached bones. The grass grows thicker here, fed by old blood.
Among the bones you find a tarnished shield bearing an unfamiliar crest, and a journal wrapped in oilcloth.
Ancient Battlefield
Selina picked up: Sling
Selina picked up: Torch
Selina picked up: Sword
Selina picked up: Dagger
Selina picked up: 106 gold
The party defeated Shadow Vanguard.
The party defeated Orc Warband.
Welcome to Thorndale!
Elder Bera: You recovered the Gold Key! Here is 150 gold for your bravery!
Aldric: I shouldn't say this, but... something's been poisoning our well water.
Aldric: I think it's coming from that old ruin to the north. Can you help?
Aldric: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!
You descend into Shadow Dungeon - Level 1... Torch lit!
Merry spotted a trap!
The party defeated Goblin.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 23 gold and Healing Herb.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 10 gold and Leather.
Merry spotted a trap!
The party defeated Orc Scouts.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 22 gold and Mace.
Your torch has burned out!
The party defeated Wolves and Goblins.
Merry spotted a trap!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 15 gold and Mace.
You descend deeper... (Floor 2/2)
Merry spotted a trap!
The party defeated Orc Scouts.
Selina reached Level 2! HP+6 MP+14
Found the Shadow Crystal! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
The party defeated Giant Rat.
You descend into Shadow Dungeon - Level 2... Torch lit!
Stairs up! Press ESC to leave.
Welcome to Thorndale!
Aldric: The Shadow Crystal sits safely behind my counter. You've earned a hero's welcome here!
